type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
H2S from disposals and transfers increased due to the following:
1- the limited use of the Sulphur Removal unit in 2024. As a result, the produced gas from Rush Lake 2 was injected at the disposal well. 
2-this facility received for disposal the produced gas from Rush Lake 1, so the H2S from disposals increased.
3-Increased produced water disposal volume in 2024

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Updated 2023 waste data (only underground injection waste in 2022)

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Reduced emissions was due to reduced quantity of the H2S in the combusted  sour gas as a result of two main factors: 
1- Decreased H2S content in the produced gas 
2-Reduced amount of the produced sour gas as a result of the overall decreased production due to natural decline and
3- The Produced Gas Injection project in Q4 of 2023 . Most of the produced sour gas was injected in the last three months of 2023 reducing the amount of the sour gas combusted in the OTSGs and flares.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Reduced emissions was due to reduced quantity of the H2S in the combusted  sour gas as a result of two main factors: 
1- Decreased H2S content in the produced gas 
2-Reduced amount of the produced sour gas as a result of the overall decreased production due to natural decline and
3- The Produced Gas Injection project in Q4 of 2023 . Most of the produced sour gas was injected in the last three months of 2023 reducing the amount of the sour gas combusted in the OTSGs and flares.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
H2S from disposals and transfers increased due to the following: 
1- the limited use of the Sulphur Removal unit in the third quarter of 2023. As a result, the produced gas from Rush Lake 2 was injected at the disposal well.
2- this facility received for disposal the produced gas from Rush Lake 1, so the H2S disposals increased.
3- increased produced water disposal volume in 2023

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Emissions increased mainly due to the following factors:
1-Increased the volume of the  Produced (Sour) Gas,
2-Increased the quantity of the un-treated produced (sour) gas used as fuel  and
3-Increased the H2S concentration in the PG. 
As a result, the H2S content in the fuel gas combusted in the OTSGs and Flares increased.
